features: A toothbrush designed for children aged 8 to 12 years
Made from sturdy and travel-friendly Material
Small, narrow head with precisely tapered, fine fibres
Help to whiten teeth and clean hard to reach areas
A comfortable handle makes the brush easy to use
description: Product Description Beauty Formulas Active oral care Junior toothbrush is intended for children aged 8 to 12 years. This toothbrush has a flexible neck that reduces pressure when brushing. The bristles are very careful with the teeth so you will get a complete cleaning without damaging your teeth or gums. A small, narrow head with precisely tapered, fine fibres reaches deeper and cleans the interdental spaces and along the gumline more effectively. A comfortable handle with an anti-slip system makes it easy to use the brush. Safety Warning Supervise children while using. Do not leave small parts unattended to avoid choking hazards.
